content.text:
The file /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4 has been edited. Here's the result of running `cat -n` on a snippet of /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4:
     1	parser grammar SYsUParser;
     2	
     3	options {
     4	  tokenVocab=SYsULexer;
     5	}
     6	
     7	@parser::members {
     8	    #include "ASTBuilder.h"
     9	    #include <nlohmann/json.hpp>
    10	    using json = nlohmann::json;
    11	    
    12	    ASTBuilder astBuilder;
    13	    
    14	    void printAST(const asg::Node* node) {
    15	        json j = astBuilder.buildJSON(node);
    16	        std::cout << j.dump(2) << std::endl;
    17	    }
    18	}
    19	
    20	compilationUnit
    21	    :   translationUnit? EOF
    22	    ;
    23	
    24	translationUnit
    25	    :   externalDeclaration+
    26	    ;
    27	
    28	externalDeclaration
    29	    :   functionDefinition
    30	    |   declaration
    31	    ;
    32	
    33	functionDefinition
    34	    : declarationSpecifiers declarator compoundStatement
    35	    {
    36	        auto func = astBuilder.makeFunction($declarator.ctx, $compoundStatement.ctx);
    37	        printAST(func);
    38	    }
    39	    ;
    40	
    41	declaration
    42	    :   declarationSpecifiers initDeclaratorList? ';'
    43	    {
    44	        auto decls = astBuilder.makeDeclaration($declarationSpecifiers.ctx, $initDeclaratorList.ctx);
    45	        for (auto decl : decls) {
    46	            printAST(decl);
    47	        }
    48	    }
    49	    ;
    50	
    51	declarationSpecifiers
    52	    :   typeSpecifier+
    53	    ;
    54	
    55	typeSpecifier
    56	    :   Int
    57	    |   Void
    58	    ;
    59	
    60	declarator
    61	    :   Identifier
    62	    |   declarator '[' ']'
    63	    |   declarator '[' assignmentExpression ']'
    64	    |   declarator '(' ')'
    65	    |   declarator '(' parameterList ')'
    66	    ;
    67	
    68	initDeclaratorList
    69	    :   initDeclarator (',' initDeclarator)*
    70	    ;
    71	
    72	initDeclarator
    73	    :   declarator
    74	    |   declarator '=' initializer
    75	    ;
    76	
    77	initializer
    78	    :   assignmentExpression
    79	    |   '{' initializerList '}'
    80	    |   '{' '}'
    81	    ;
    82	
    83	initializerList
    84	    :   initializer (',' initializer)*
    85	    ;
    86	
    87	compoundStatement
    88	    :   '{' blockItemList? '}'
    89	    ;
    90	
    91	blockItemList
    92	    :   blockItem+
    93	    ;
    94	
    95	blockItem
    96	    :   statement
    97	    |   declaration
    98	    ;
    99	
   100	statement
   101	    :   compoundStatement
   102	    |   expressionStatement
   103	    |   jumpStatement
   104	    ;
   105	
   106	expressionStatement
   107	    :   expression? ';'
   108	    ;
   109	
   110	jumpStatement
   111	    :   Return expression? ';'
   112	    ;
   113	
   114	expression
   115	    :   assignmentExpression (',' assignmentExpression)*
   116	    ;
   117	
   118	assignmentExpression
   119	    :   logicalOrExpression
   120	    |   unaryExpression '=' assignmentExpression
   121	    ;
   122	
   123	logicalOrExpression
   124	    :   logicalAndExpression
   125	    ;
   126	
   127	logicalAndExpression
   128	    :   equalityExpression
   129	    ;
   130	
   131	equalityExpression
   132	    :   relationalExpression
   133	    ;
   134	
   135	relationalExpression
   136	    :   additiveExpression
   137	    ;
   138	
   139	additiveExpression
   140	    :   multiplicativeExpression
   141	    |   additiveExpression '+' multiplicativeExpression
   142	    |   additiveExpression '-' multiplicativeExpression
   143	    ;
   144	
   145	multiplicativeExpression
   146	    :   unaryExpression
   147	    ;
   148	
   149	unaryExpression
   150	    :   postfixExpression
   151	    |   '-' unaryExpression
   152	    ;
   153	
   154	postfixExpression
   155	    :   primaryExpression
   156	    |   postfixExpression '(' ')'
   157	    |   postfixExpression '(' argumentExpressionList ')'
   158	    ;
   159	
   160	primaryExpression
   161	    :   Identifier
   162	    |   Constant
   163	    |   '(' expression ')'
   164	    ;
   165	
   166	parameterList
   167	    :   parameterDeclaration (',' parameterDeclaration)*
   168	    ;
   169	
   170	parameterDeclaration
   171	    :   declarationSpecifiers declarator
   172	    ;
   173	
   174	argumentExpressionList
   175	    :   assignmentExpression (',' assignmentExpression)*
   176	    ;
   177	
   178	
   179	assignmentExpression
   180	    :   additiveExpression
   181	
Review the changes and make sure they are as expected. Edit the file again if necessary.
